description: Migrate to Vercel AI SDK, implement 4-phase report pipeline (Plan → Gather → Write → Validate), add templates and few-shot examples

userStories.title: Audit Existing AI Code + Vercel AI SDK Patterns
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit the current AI implementation and understand Vercel AI SDK patterns so that the migration is informed and we reuse existing code.
acceptanceCriteria: Document all imports/usages of src/lib/ai/client.ts across the codebase
Document all tool definitions in src/lib/ai/tools/ — their JSON Schema shapes and executor functions
Document the chat flow in src/server/api/routers/ai.ts — how tool loops work, how messages are saved
Document the report flow in src/trigger/generate-ai-report.ts — phases, progress tracking, dataStore
Research Vercel AI SDK patterns: generateText with maxSteps, streamText, tool() with Zod, OpenRouter provider setup via createOpenAI({ baseURL })
Document migration mapping: which current functions map to which SDK functions
Write findings to scripts/ralph/progress.txt
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Audit complete. Key finding: use @openrouter/ai-sdk-provider (not @ai-sdk/openai). SDK uses stopWhen: stepCountIs(N) instead of maxSteps.

userStories.title: Install Vercel AI SDK + OpenRouter Provider
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Vercel AI SDK installed with an OpenRouter-compatible provider so that all subsequent stories can use it.
acceptanceCriteria: Install packages: bun add ai @ai-sdk/openai
Create src/lib/ai/provider.ts — configure OpenRouter provider using createOpenAI with baseURL https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 and apiKey from env
Export helper functions: getModel(modelId: string) that returns a Vercel AI SDK model instance
Export default models: getChatModel() uses DEFAULT_CHAT_MODEL, getReportModel() uses DEFAULT_REPORT_MODEL
Include OpenRouter-specific headers (HTTP-Referer, X-Title) via provider config
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Used @openrouter/ai-sdk-provider instead of @ai-sdk/openai. Fixed pre-existing build errors (Bun global type conflict, TS narrowing).

userStories.title: Migrate Tool Definitions to Vercel AI SDK Format
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all AI tool definitions converted to Vercel AI SDK tool() format with Zod schemas so that they work with generateText and streamText.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/tools/definitions.ts with Vercel AI SDK tool definitions
Convert each tool's JSON Schema parameters to Zod schemas: run_query, call_analytics, get_market_data, run_python, store_report_data
Each tool definition includes description matching the existing descriptions
Each tool has an execute function that calls the existing executor (reuse executeRunQuery, executeCallAnalytics, etc.)
Export getChatTools(context) and getReportTools(context) that return tool maps with context (userId, db, dataStore) bound
Existing src/lib/ai/tools/index.ts exports preserved for backward compatibility during migration
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Used z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()) for input param — Zod in this project requires both key and value schemas.

userStories.title: Replace AI Client with Vercel AI SDK
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to replace the hand-rolled OpenRouter client with Vercel AI SDK functions so that all AI calls use the new SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/client-v2.ts (new file, coexists with old client during migration)
Export aiGenerateText(options) wrapping Vercel AI SDK generateText() with model from provider, system prompt, messages, tools, maxSteps
Export aiStreamText(options) wrapping streamText() with same config
Both functions handle OpenRouter errors and map to existing OpenRouterError format
Token usage extracted from Vercel AI SDK response (usage.totalTokens etc.)
Retry logic: wrap with existing exponential backoff for 429/5xx errors
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: AI SDK v6 uses ModelMessage (not CoreMessage), maxOutputTokens (not maxTokens), inputTokens/outputTokens (not promptTokens/completionTokens).

userStories.title: Migrate Chat to Vercel AI SDK
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the chat tool-calling loop in ai.ts router to use Vercel AI SDK so that chat and reports share the same SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/server/api/routers/ai.ts sendMessage procedure to use aiGenerateText from client-v2.ts
Replace manual for-loop with maxSteps: MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS_CHAT — Vercel AI SDK handles the tool loop automatically
Tools provided via getChatTools(context) from the new definitions
System prompt building unchanged (same buildSystemPrompt call)
Message format conversion: map existing ChatMessage[] to Vercel AI SDK CoreMessage[] format
Token usage still tracked from response (usage.totalTokens)
Tool calls still saved to aiMessages.toolCalls column
All existing chat behavior preserved — same tools, same limits, same error handling
Old chatCompletion import removed from ai.ts
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Tool call property is 'input' not 'args'. toolCallId for id. Biome reorders imports alphabetically.

userStories.title: Create Report Planner Phase
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a planner phase that analyzes the user's prompt and outputs a structured markdown analysis plan so that subsequent phases know exactly what data to gather and what sections to write.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/planner.ts
Export runPlannerPhase(options) function taking prompt, userContext, and model
Uses generateText with a planner-specific system prompt instructing the model to: analyze the request, list data sources needed, outline report sections, identify MDX components, estimate tool calls
Planner does NOT have access to tools — it only plans, never executes
Planner system prompt includes: condensed user context, list of available analytics endpoints (names + descriptions only), list of available MDX components (names + data shape summaries)
Returns { plan: string, tokensUsed: number } — plan is the markdown output
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Planner phase created at src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/planner.ts. Uses aiGenerateText with NO tools. System prompt includes condensed analytics endpoints list, MDX component catalog, and planner instructions. Accepts optional templateHint for template-driven reports.

userStories.title: Create Report Data Gatherer Phase
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a data gatherer phase that reads the planner's output and executes all necessary tool calls to populate the dataStore so that the writer has all data ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/gatherer.ts
Export runGathererPhase(options) function taking plan, prompt, userContext, schemaContext, model, userId, db, and dataStore
Uses generateText with maxSteps set to MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS_REPORT (20)
Has access to ALL tools: run_query, call_analytics, get_market_data, run_python, store_report_data
System prompt instructs: execute the analysis plan, call tools to gather data, use store_report_data to register datasets, do NOT write report prose
System prompt includes the plan, full schema context, and data handling notes (timezone, breakeven, etc.)
Returns { tokensUsed: number, dataStoreKeys: string[], totalToolCalls: number }
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Gatherer phase created at src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/gatherer.ts. Uses aiGenerateText with ALL report tools (run_query, call_analytics, get_market_data, run_python, store_report_data) and maxSteps=MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS_REPORT. System prompt includes plan, user context, schema context, and data handling notes. Returns tokensUsed, dataStoreKeys, totalToolCalls.

userStories.title: Create Condensed Writer Context
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a condensed context builder for the writer phase that only includes what the writer needs so that the writer operates with minimal context noise.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/writer-context.ts
Export buildWriterContext(options) taking dataStore Map and plan string

Generates condensed context containing: analysis plan, data summaries per dataStore entry (refId, description, first 3 rows if array or key fields if object), full MDX component catalog, formatting rules
Does NOT include: database schema, SQL syntax, tRPC endpoint docs, tool descriptions
Context size roughly 40-60% smaller than the current full system prompt
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/writer-context.ts. Exports buildWriterContext(options) taking dataStore Map and plan string. Generates condensed context with: analysis plan, data summaries (first 3 rows for arrays, key fields for objects), full MDX component catalog, formatting rules. Excludes schema, SQL, tool descriptions, and tRPC docs.

userStories.title: Create Report Writer Phase + Few-Shot Examples
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a writer phase with few-shot examples that takes gathered data and plan, then produces the final MDX report with maximum writing quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/writer.ts
Create src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/few-shot-examples.ts with WRITER_FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES string
Few-shot examples: 2 curated report sections — one performance overview (MetricGrid, EquityCurve, Callout), one risk analysis (DrawdownTable, MonteCarloChart, RMultipleChart)
Examples demonstrate: correct dataRef usage, mixing prose and MDX naturally, specific numbers in narrative, actionable recommendations, proper formatting
Export runWriterPhase(options) taking plan, writerContext, prompt, model, and dataStoreKeys
Uses generateText with NO tools — writer only writes, never calls tools
System prompt instructs: write MDX report following plan, use provided dataRef keys, follow formatting rules, include executive summary and recommendations
Few-shot examples integrated into writer system prompt
Returns { content: string, tokensUsed: number }
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/writer.ts and src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/few-shot-examples.ts. Writer uses aiGenerateText with NO tools. System prompt includes writer context, dataRef key list, writing instructions, and two curated few-shot examples (performance overview with MetricGrid/EquityCurve/Callout, risk analysis with DrawdownTable/RMultipleChart/MonteCarloChart). Returns { content, tokensUsed }.

userStories.title: Create Report Validator + Auto-Repair Phase
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a validator phase that checks the writer's MDX output for broken dataRefs and compilation errors, and auto-repairs if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/validator.ts
Export runValidatorPhase(options) taking content, dataStoreKeys, and model
DataRef validation: parse all MDX components, extract dataRef attributes, check each exists in dataStoreKeys
MDX compilation check: attempt to compile MDX using next-mdx-remote (same as viewer) — catch compilation errors
Component validation: check all MDX component names are from the known catalog
If validation passes: return { valid: true, content } unchanged
If validation fails: attempt auto-repair up to 2 times — build repair prompt listing specific errors, call generateText to fix, re-validate
If repair fails after 2 attempts: return { valid: false, content: originalContent, errors: string[] } — graceful degradation
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/report-pipeline/validator.ts. Exports runValidatorPhase(options) taking content, dataStoreKeys, and model. Three validation checks: (1) component name validation against KNOWN_COMPONENTS set matching mdxComponents registry, (2) dataRef validation checking existence in dataStoreKeys and required dataRef for chart/display components, (3) MDX compilation check using compileMDX from next-mdx-remote/rsc with sanitizeMdxProse. Auto-repair: up to 2 attempts using aiGenerateText with a repair-specific prompt listing errors and available keys. Graceful degradation: returns original content with errors if repair fails. Returns { valid, content, errors, tokensUsed }.

userStories.title: Report Templates
userStories.description: As a developer, I want pre-defined report templates so that users get consistent, structured reports and the LLM doesn't have to invent structure from scratch.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-templates/index.ts
Create ReportTemplate type with: id, name, description, sections array ({ title, description, suggestedDataSources, suggestedComponents }), plannerHint string
Monthly Review template: equity curve, monthly P&L, win rate trends, symbol breakdown, behavioral patterns, recommendations
Risk Audit template: drawdown analysis, position sizing, R-multiple distribution, Monte Carlo, risk of ruin, risk-adjusted returns
Strategy Comparison template: per-strategy metrics, win rate/expectancy/profit factor comparison, recommendations
Export getTemplate(id) and getAllTemplates() functions
Templates are data-only (no LLM calls) — they augment the planner prompt
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/report-templates/index.ts. Exports ReportTemplate type, 3 templates (monthly-review, risk-audit, strategy-comparison), getTemplate(id), getAllTemplates(). Each template has: id, name, description, sections array (title, description, suggestedDataSources, suggestedComponents), and plannerHint string. Templates are data-only — no LLM calls. PlannerHint provides structured guidance for the planner phase.

userStories.title: Rewire Report Generation to 4-Phase Pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want generate-ai-report.ts to use the new 4-phase pipeline instead of the single tool-calling loop.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/trigger/generate-ai-report.ts to call phases sequentially: runPlannerPhase (planning), runGathererPhase (gathering_data), runWriterPhase (writing), runValidatorPhase (validating)
Progress tracking updated with new stage names: building_context → planning → gathering_data → writing → validating → complete
Token usage aggregated across all 4 phases
Tool call count from gatherer phase saved to totalToolCalls
chartsGenerated from dataStore size (same as before)
DataStore, content, and dataArtifacts saving unchanged
Email notification unchanged
If planner fails: fallback — run gatherer with raw user prompt (graceful degradation)
If validator reports errors but repair failed: save content anyway with warnings logged
Remove the old single-loop logic entirely
Template support: if report initiated with templateId, pass template plannerHint to planner phase
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Rewired src/trigger/generate-ai-report.ts to use 4-phase pipeline: Plan → Gather → Write → Validate. Replaced old single tool-calling loop entirely. New progress stages: building_context → planning → gathering_data → writing → validating → complete. Token usage aggregated across all 4 phases. Planner failure fallback uses raw prompt. Validator failure saves content with logged warnings. Template support via optional templateId in payload → getTemplate() → plannerHint. Old imports (chatCompletion, ChatMessage, ToolCall, executeTool, getToolsForMode, buildSystemPrompt) removed. New imports: getModel, pipeline phases, buildWriterContext, getTemplate. 139 lines added, 218 removed.

userStories.title: Clean Up Old Client + Migration Artifacts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove the old hand-rolled OpenRouter client and consolidate to a single Vercel AI SDK client.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove src/lib/ai/client.ts (old hand-rolled client)
Rename src/lib/ai/client-v2.ts to src/lib/ai/client.ts (or inline into consumers)
Remove old tool definition format from src/lib/ai/tools/index.ts — only keep Vercel AI SDK format
Update all remaining imports across codebase (grep for old client imports)
Remove ChatMessage, ToolCall, ToolDefinition, ChatCompletionOptions, ChatCompletionResponse, StreamChunk types if fully replaced
Remove fetchWithRetry, buildHeaders, buildRequestBody helper functions
Verify no references to old client remain
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Removed old hand-rolled OpenRouter client (client.ts). Moved OpenRouterError into client-v2.ts, renamed client-v2.ts → client.ts via git mv. Removed all old types (ChatMessage, ToolCall, ToolDefinition, ChatCompletionOptions, ChatCompletionResponse, StreamChunk, TokenUsage). Removed fetchWithRetry, buildHeaders, buildRequestBody. Removed old JSON Schema tool definitions from all 5 tool files (run-query, call-analytics, get-market-data, run-python, store-report-data). Cleaned tools/index.ts: removed AI_TOOLS, AI_REPORT_TOOLS, getToolsForMode; kept executeTool (used by tests). Updated 5 pipeline/router imports from client-v2 → client. Updated 2 test files to mock aiGenerateText instead of chatCompletion. 185 additions, 683 deletions.

userStories.title: Template Selection UI
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to choose a report template when creating a report so that I get structured, consistent analysis without writing detailed prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the report creation UI to show template options alongside the free-text prompt
Display 3 template cards: Monthly Review, Risk Audit, Strategy Comparison
Each card shows: name, description, number of sections
User can select a template OR write a free-form prompt (template auto-fills a default prompt)
When template selected, pass templateId to the startReport mutation
Update ai.startReport tRPC mutation to accept optional templateId parameter
Pass templateId through to the Trigger.dev task payload
Terminal design system styling: dark cards, chartreuse accent on selected, monospace labels
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Added template selection UI to report-interface.tsx. 3 template cards (Monthly Review, Risk Audit, Strategy Comparison) displayed above the prompt textarea. Selecting a template highlights it with chartreuse accent and auto-fills a default prompt. Deselecting clears the template. templateId passed through startReport tRPC mutation → Trigger.dev task payload. Terminal design system styling: monospace fonts, dark cards, chartreuse accent on selected. 93 lines added across 2 files.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Report Pipeline Phases
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the individual pipeline phase modules so that we can verify each phase works correctly in isolation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/integration/ai-report-pipeline.test.ts
Test buildWriterContext: given mock dataStore and plan, verify output contains data summaries and MDX catalog, excludes schema/SQL docs
Test runValidatorPhase with valid MDX: returns { valid: true }
Test runValidatorPhase with missing dataRef: detects the error
Test runValidatorPhase with invalid component name: detects the error
Test getTemplate returns correct structure for each template
Test getAllTemplates returns all 3 templates
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created tests/integration/ai-report-pipeline.test.ts with 19 tests across 3 describe blocks. Tests: buildWriterContext (6 tests — data summaries, MDX catalog, formatting rules, excludes schema/SQL, empty dataStore, array truncation), runValidatorPhase (6 tests — valid MDX passes, missing dataRef detected, non-existent dataRef detected, invalid component names detected, MDX compilation errors detected, tokensUsed:0 when valid), Report Templates (7 tests — getTemplate structure for all 3 templates, unknown IDs return undefined, getAllTemplates returns 3, unique IDs, expected IDs present). Mocked compileMDX (RSC module) and aiGenerateText for validator tests.
